{"command": "python3 << 'EOF'
with open('/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp', 'r') as f:

    "  return ret;\n\n\nExpr*\nAst2Asg::operator()(ast::ConditionalExpressionContext* ctx)",
    "  return ret;\n}\n\nExpr*\nAst2Asg::operator()(ast::ConditionalExpressionContext* ctx)"
)

with open('/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp', 'w') as f:

EOF", "summary": "Fix missing return statement with Python"
